title: Operate the drift monitoring and response loop
description: Continuously measure input, prediction, and outcome drift, then route breaches to retrain or investigate.
body: Use when a model is live and its inputs can shift over time. Avoid monitoring only system latency — accuracy can rot while infra looks healthy. Actions: compute feature drift, prediction drift, and delayed-label outcome drift on a schedule, compare against baselines, and route a breach to either an automatic retrain or a human investigation. Validation signals include a drift report with baseline deltas and an alert that fired on a seeded distribution shift. Risk boundary: silent accuracy decay misleads every downstream decision; if outcome labels are unavailable, escalate to design a proxy before declaring the model healthy.
